steps.title: Recognize the task's core demand
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between Judeth Insel and Ricky Quiñones.

steps.title: Find the choice that fulfills this demand
steps.content:
B directly contrasts the musicians using both... but... whereas, explicitly highlighting the difference in their instruments (viola vs. guitar).

The others either mention only one musician (A), don't mention either musician (C), or stress their similarity (D).

This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
